PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetFunctionCallStatementImpl(FUNCTION_CALL_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('notice')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCaseExpressionImpl(CASE_EXPRESSION)
      PsiElement(CASE)('case')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('x')
      PsiPuppetBracedCaseOptsBlockImpl(BRACED_CASE_OPTS_BLOCK)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
          PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
            Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
              PsiElement($)('$')
              PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
          PsiElement(:)(':')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''an array with both vim and emacs'')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
          PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
            PsiPuppetExpressionUnaryImpl(EXPRESSION_UNARY)
              PsiElement(*)('*')
              Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
                PsiElement($)('$')
                PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('a')
          PsiElement(:)(':')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''vim or emacs'')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiPuppetCaseOptionImpl(CASE_OPTION)
          PsiPuppetCaseValuesImpl(CASE_VALUES)
            PsiPuppetDefaultWrapperImpl(DEFAULT_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(DEFAULT)('default')
          PsiElement(:)(':')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
            PsiElement({)('{')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
              PsiElement(SINGLE_QUOTED_STRING)(''no match'')
            PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
            PsiElement(})('}')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
